name: Bayt'al-Hecahands
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>見えざる導き手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>バイト・アル・ヘカトンケイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Tribute 1 monster you control that is a "Hecahands" monster or a monster owned by your opponent; take control of 1 monster your opponent controls. You can only use this effect of "Bayt'al-Hecahands" once per turn. Once per turn, during your End Phase: Send 1 card you control to the GY.
eff: You can Tribute 1 monster you control that is a "Hecahands" monster or a monster owned by your opponent; take control of 1 monster your opponent controls. You can only use this effect of "Bayt'al-Hecahands" once per turn. Once per turn, during your End Phase: Send 1 card you control to the GY.

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
